core_model.structure_summary: Minimization of a linear cost functional over the set of couplings of two fixed marginal measures, characterized through its dual and a pointwise optimality condition on the support of the optimal coupling.

variables.meaning: coupling measure on the product space with prescribed marginals
integrated cost of transporting mass between two distributions
cost kernel as a function of a pair of points

deterministic_skeleton.summary: Constrained minimization of a linear objective over probability couplings with fixed marginals, reducing to the duality/first-order optimality condition on the transport support.

notes: The Monge-Kantorovich optimal mass transport problem with a general cost. Objective is linear in the coupling but the cost kernel is a general (possibly nonlinear) function, hence linearity 'mixed'. Display equations are heavily contaminated with LaTeX macro-definition noise; identification rests on title/abstract plus the duality equation c(T1x,T2x)=phi+psi and D1 c=grad phi.
